text:
To add structured data on your WordPress site, you can follow these steps:

1. **Access your WordPress Admin Dashboard**.
2. **Navigate to Appearance → Theme Editor**.
3. **Select the header.php file** from the list on the right.
4. **Paste the structured data script** (JSON-LD format) in the `<head>` section before the closing `</head>` tag.
5. **Save the changes**.

If you have specific structured data you want to implement, you can find the relevant JSON-LD code in the Setup tab of your FlowBlinq GEO audit results. Just replace any placeholders with your actual data.

Let me know if you need help with anything else!
